header.headline: IR V2 Pipeline
header.subtitle: The second-generation pipeline refines the handoffs between representation, lowering, and runtime generation.

capture.title: IR Capture
capture.body: Record richer graph semantics and explicit family intent up front.

refine.title: IR Refine
refine.body: Normalize and enrich the graph into a more runnable intermediate form.

lower.title: Lowering
lower.body: Lower refined IR into runtime-facing artifacts with fewer ambiguities.

runtime.title: Runtime Build
runtime.body: Build the final callable runtime bundle from the lowered representation.

outcome.title: Operational Pipeline
outcome.body: The v2 line is useful when every stage boundary becomes easier to reason about.

footer.note: Versioned pipelines are worth training because they force the model to preserve stage semantics.
